# Business Document Generator - Copilot Instructions

This is a comprehensive business document generation and project management web application for a software development company specializing in web development, UI/UX design, and digital solutions.

## Project Overview
- **Frontend**: React.js with modern UI components
- **Backend**: Node.js/Express with RESTful APIs
- **Database**: JSON-based storage (upgradeable to MongoDB/PostgreSQL)
- **Document Generation**: PDF generation with customizable templates
- **Features**: Client onboarding, project tracking, document generation, automation

## Key Business Requirements
- Client onboarding and management
- Professional document generation (invoices, quotes, proposals)
- Project progress tracking with milestones
- Post-launch support management
- Dashboard analytics and automation

## Development Guidelines
- Use modern ES6+ JavaScript
- Implement responsive design
- Follow REST API conventions
- Include error handling and validation
- Focus on professional business workflows
